issue_title: fix: fix broken space delegationPortal settings
issue_body_preview:
### Summary

<!-- Related issues, a description or list of the changes and the motivation behind them -->

Closes: https://github.com/snapshot-labs/snapshot/issues/4912

This PR fixes the broken delegation portal, due to TuneForm not supporting having other thing than a choice list in `anyOf`,
test_description_zh: 进入一个 Space 的设置页面，找到 delegation（委托）相关的设置区域，尝试配置 delegationPortal 相关选项，观察表单是否正常渲染和交互。
expected_result_zh: delegationPortal 设置表单应正常渲染，所有表单控件（包括 TuneForm 中的选项）正常显示且可交互，用户能够正确选择和保存委托门户配置，不会出现表单损坏或无法操作的情况。
